arts.ttl: Feyenoord’s Santiago Gimenez keen on Milan move and could ask for exit
arts.sum: Eredivisie side Feyenoord’s Santiago Gimenez keen on Milan transfer. According to a report by La Gazzetta dello Sport, Milan are finding ways to pay Feyenoord’s asking price for Santiago Gimenez…

arts.ttl: Milan Secures Gimenez’s Approval, Initiate Talks with Feyenoord; Walker’s Debut Set for Derby
arts.sum: AC Milan have received a positive signal from Santiago Gimenez, and negotiations with Feyenoord are set to begin. The Mexican striker with an Italian passport has expressed his desire to don the red and black jersey, and his entourage is working to make this dream a reality. The post Milan Secures Gimenez’s Approval, Initiate Talks with Feyenoord; Walker’s Debut Set for Derby appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford and Kyle Walker learn transfer fate as AC Milan make final choice
arts.sum: AC Milan had been the leading contenders to sign both Marcus Rashford and Kyle Walker, but Serie A rules state that their clubs can only sign one British star per year

arts.ttl: Santiago Giménez Emerges as Top Target for AC Milan
arts.sum: AC Milan are widening their search for a new striker for manager Sergio Conceição, with Santiago Giménez from Feyenoord emerging as the primary target. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that after extensive evaluations of Marcus Rashford from Manchester United, the Rossoneri have shifted their focus to the Mexican forward. The post Santiago Giménez Emerges as Top Target for AC Milan appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: AC Milan Parts Ways with Fodé Ballo-Touré
arts.sum: AC Milan have officially announced the mutual termination of Fodé Ballo-Touré's contract, marking the end of the defender's journey with the club. The 28-year-old Senegalese left-back, who originally joined Milan in 2021, departs after a tenure that included a Scudetto victory in the 2021-22 season. The post OFFICIAL: AC Milan Parts Ways with Fodé Ballo-Touré appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Bad news for Christian Pulisic ahead of crucial Champions League game
arts.sum: During his 18 months in Italy Pulisic has largely been deployed on the right wing, albeit with the freedom to drift inside and influence the game. Head coach Sergio Conceicao has confirmed that Pulisic is still struggling with the knock and is very unlikely to play against Girona.

arts.ttl: Report: AC Milan make it clear to Chelsea how much they are willing to pay for Joao Felix

arts.ttl: Milan’s Future Challenges: Conceição’s Dilemma and the U23 Project
arts.sum: AC Milan's ambitious plan to create synergy between the first team and their U23 squad, Milan Futuro, is facing significant hurdles. Both teams are grappling with their own set of problems, forcing the club to look elsewhere for solutions. This applies to both first-team coach Sergio Conceição and Milan Futuro manager Daniele Bonera. The post Milan’s Future Challenges: Conceição’s Dilemma and the U23 Project appeared first on FootItalia.com.
